summary: Tests cover main functional areas (XML/JSON parsing, aggregation, flaky detection, markdown generation, error handling) but are fundamentally incomplete and would fail immediately. Critical issues: (1) Test fixtures (build-1-tests.xml, build-2-tests.xml, build-3-tests.json) are referenced but not provided — tests cannot run; (2) GitHub Actions workflow file is missing entirely (required by task); (3) Tests do not run through act as explicitly mandated; (4) No act-result.txt artifact generation. Rigor is weak: only happy paths and one error case tested; no malformed input, boundary conditions, or edge cases (empty files, zero values, floating-point precision, missing attributes); flaky detection test merely checks if output contains test names, not if the logic actually identifies flaky tests correctly; duration computation test checks for exact value "4.8" without validating the calculation. Design is clean in structure (good naming, setup function, test independence) but fixtures are essential and absent. Test would fail immediately on first fixture access.
